name: First-Time Homeowner
description: Needs simple guidance for emergency backup power.
primary_goal: Confidence in buying the right size safely.

name: Experienced Homeowner
description: Has owned generators before and compares features.
primary_goal: Upgrade to better reliability or fuel flexibility.

name: Storm Prepper
description: Prepares ahead of hurricane or winter storm season.
primary_goal: Reliable backup power before outages occur.
concerns: Availability, fuel storage, safety, long runtime

name: RV Owner
primary_goal: Quiet portable power for RV appliances.
concerns: Noise, weight, RV-ready outlets, inverter power

name: Camper
description: Uses power outdoors away from home.
primary_goal: Portable quiet power for small devices.

name: Senior Homeowner
description: Needs easy and safe emergency power.
concerns: Electric start, CO safety, portability, complexity

name: Budget Shopper
description: Wants best value and acceptable reliability.

name: Off-Grid Cabin Owner
description: Needs remote backup and occasional use.
